Name: Number of times 'Accepted + Assigned' is immediately followed by 'Completed + Resolved'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + Resolved' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities that occur after 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in variants that eventually lead to 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' relative to the frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Number of process variants where 'Accepted + Assigned' appears before 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + Closed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases containing 'Accepted + Assigned' that do not contain 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases where 'Completed + In Call' does not happen

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in high-impact incidents (impact = 'High')
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities == 'High' where ma is the last value of impact

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities that are part of variants with performance duration below the median
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases

Name: Number of times 'Accepted + Assigned' occurs in the same case as 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' executed by resources also involved in 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in variants that include any 'Accepted + Wait' sub-type activity
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' relative to the total occurrences of assignment-related activities (e.g., compared to 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment')
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Number of distinct cases where 'Accepted + Assigned' appears more than once
Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities that directly precede a waiting state (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', etc.)
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in variants that end with 'Completed + Resolved' versus those ending with 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' occurring in the first half of the process lifecycle within each variant
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases

Name: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' events per year to assess temporal trends in assignment behavior
